message:
chore: add .gitignore and .ubsignore for ephemeral files

- Ignore macOS resource forks (._*) and metadata (.DS_Store)
- Ignore beads daemon logs
- Ignore editor artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# macOS resource forks and metadata
+._*
+.DS_Store
+.AppleDouble
+.LSOverride
+
+# Beads daemon logs
+.beads/daemon-*.log.gz
+
+# Editor artifacts
+*.swp
+*.swo
+*~

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# macOS resource forks (not code)
+._*
+
+# Log files (not code)
+*.log
+*.log.gz
+.beads/daemon-*.log.gz
+
+# Binary/metadata files (not code)
+.DS_Store
